summary: Iteration 4 features (Ajustes tab, theme toggle, reparto reorder, backup move) all verified working on mobile viewport (390x844). All 5 tabs render, theme toggle flips light<->dark with localStorage persistence (erp_theme_mode_v1='dark'), reparto reorder swaps items correctly (NAME_0 <-> NAME_1 after clicking down on first), first-up & last-down buttons properly disabled (opacity 0.25), backup export-light produces valid JSON with no data:image base64, export-full works, Resumen no longer contains backup buttons. NOTE: On initial load there was a transient 'ReferenceError: C is not defined' in ResumenView that disappeared after `supervisorctl restart expo` (stale HMR bundle). After restart, ResumenView renders cleanly with card-net + all 4 KPI cards visible.

react_native_issues.issue: Console deprecation warnings: 'shadow*' style props are deprecated. Use boxShadow. Non-blocking but should migrate styles.

action_items: Migrate shadow* style props to boxShadow (low priority, just warnings)

Investigate transient stale HMR bundle that caused ResumenView 'C is not defined' on fresh page-load before expo restart. Likely cache/Metro issue, not a code bug — recommend clearing .metro-cache between major refactors.
critical_code_review_comments: useUI() hook correctly memoizes styles per theme; ThemeProvider properly wraps Stack in _layout.tsx
moveRepartoItem in store.ts uses proper bounds checking (newIdx < 0 || >= length) before splice
Theme persistence via storage.setItem(STORAGE_KEY, m) is correctly placed in both toggle() and setMode(); useEffect on mount restores saved mode
Detail screens (LedgerDetail, RepartoDetail) hardcode StatusBar barStyle='light-content' regardless of mode — acceptable since detail headers are always dark
seed_data_creation: Used existing seed data (2 clients, 1 provider, 1 reparto day). Added 1 reparto item during reorder test (total 3 items).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Test creds N/A (no auth). Theme localStorage key: erp_theme_mode_v1. If you see 'C is not defined' on fresh load, run `sudo supervisorctl restart expo` first.
rca_of_issue: Transient ResumenView error pre-restart was due to stale Metro/HMR bundle reflecting old code without C destructuring; resolved by expo service restart — not reproducible in current state.
